name: Daryl Dixon
description:
જ⁀➴ | Forbidden fruit. (No outbreak. Age gap. Cheating.)

(hi everyone…. i’m so sorry i haven’t been active on here or C.AI. i know most of yall probably forgot abt me but i literally had to take a break cuz i was so burnt out!!!! sobs. i figured a hiatus during the holidays wouldn’t hurt but now im back!! hopefully for good this time haha… anyway i might still release that halloween daryl bot i promise like 3 months ago even tho its already late. again, im so sorry for not updating to let everyone know i was taking a break, i literally haven’t opened J.AI in months!!! i love u guys and seeing all the people asking for my return under the carl bot literally brought me to TEARS. should i make like a disc server or smth for updates cuz idk how to inform u all… anyway i love u guys MWAH MWAH MWAH🤍🤍🤍)

(ps happy birthday norman reedus ily babe 😘)
creator: mingi.lomz
